literature.title: Edge-Gated Graph Neural Network for Predicting Protein-Ligand Binding Affinities
literature.journal: IEEE International Conference on Bioinformatics and Biomedicine (BIBM)

study_fork.changes_summary: Fixed SMILES input in `egGNN_pipeline.py` to read from a file path instead of accepting a raw string; patched PyTorch/DGL compatibility in `run_egGNN()` (added missing `approximate` attribute on GELU layers and `_size` on ParameterList modules); added `--out_csv` arg, per-complex timing, and skip-if-already-done logic to `run_egGNN.py`; added SLURM batch script for CASF-2016 inference; added conda environment file and a README note about SMILES generation.
